nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risedevtool crate, the developer tool that orchestrates RisingWave component lifecycle and cluster management.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive developer guide for RiseDev covering usage (service bootstrap, e2e tests, debug workflows), configuration file structure with template/variable/wildcard expansion, and architectural overview of component provisioning.

nodes.name: adbc.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo Make task configuration for downloading, removing, and updating the ADBC Snowflake connector binary used in RiseDev.

nodes.name: common.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo Make task configuration for common RiseDev setup tasks: directory preparation, configuration checking, and general cluster preparation.

nodes.name: connector.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo Make task configuration for downloading Maven and connector dependencies used in RiseDev integration tests.

nodes.name: gcloud-pubsub.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo Make task configuration for downloading the Google Cloud Pub/Sub emulator binary for RiseDev.

nodes.name: grafana.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo Make task configuration for downloading the Grafana monitoring binary for RiseDev.

nodes.name: lakekeeper.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo Make task configuration for downloading the Lakekeeper Iceberg catalog binary for RiseDev.

nodes.name: minio.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo Make task configuration for downloading MinIO object storage server and CLI binaries for RiseDev.

nodes.name: moat.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo Make task configuration for downloading, removing, and updating the Moat security tool binary for RiseDev.

nodes.name: prometheus.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo Make task configuration for downloading the Prometheus metrics server binary for RiseDev.

nodes.name: redis.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo Make task configuration for downloading the Redis in-memory data store binary for RiseDev.

nodes.name: risedev-components.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo Make task configuration for the risedev configure/reconfigure workflow, checking and initializing component binaries.

nodes.name: risedev-schema.json
nodes.summary: JSON Schema for the risedev.yml configuration file, defining valid profile structures for the RiseDev cluster tool.

nodes.name: run_command.sh
nodes.summary: Shell utility that runs a given command while capturing output to a log file (with ANSI stripping) and writing the exit status to a status file used by risedev-dev for early-exit detection.

nodes.name: tempo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo Make task configuration for downloading the Grafana Tempo distributed tracing binary for RiseDev.

nodes.name: welcome.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that prints the RiseDev ASCII art banner and launches an interactive shell session for the developer.
